name: Majors Golf
about: Majors Golf is an indoor golf facility featuring six Trackman simulator bays and two putting studios, offering a range of services from practice and play to retail and coaching. The venue combines high-end technology with a family-friendly atmosphere, featuring Trackman 4 and iO systems for accurate shot tracking and a variety of software options for course play and skill improvement. Pricing is accessible through memberships, hourly packages, and a dedicated mobile app for booking, catering to both casual players and serious golfers seeking a comprehensive indoor experience.
why_golfers_like_it: World-class Trackman technology for precise swing and ball tracking
Family-friendly environment with kids' clinics and arcade-style games
Full retail shop with modern and classic golf brands
Dedicated indoor putting suite with Full Swing and PuttView technologies
Convenient mobile app for real-time booking and membership management

food_and_drink.notes: Rizzo's pizza available for events; snacks provided during kids' clinics
Beer, wine, and hard cider available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Six bays with Trackman 4 and iO technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Majors Golf provides free access to right- and left-handed golf clubs for kids' clinics. Personal clubs are recommended for adult sessions, but rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but the venue offers snacks and Rizzo's pizza for events. Beer, wine, and hard cider are available for purchase on-site.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round is not specified, but sessions are booked by the hour, and the mobile app allows for real-time scheduling.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Majors Golf offers Cubs Clinics for kids, arcade-style Trackman games, and family events like Arcade Night, with age and skill-based grouping.
